title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Beyond Wildlife India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Beyond Wildlife India
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India:
Beyond Wildlife India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
